popularStory.headline: THE KELSO EARLDOM OF ANCIENT SCOTLAND
popularStory.description: April 25, 1057 was coronation day for Malcom III, King of Scotland. Gathered around him that day at the stone of Scone were the principal barons of Scotland. Among them was Vinget Calco of Chalchou …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Matilda Maud Bruce於1303年7月12日出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林時，她的父親Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots29歲，母親Elizabeth de Burgh, Queen of Scots29歲。她於1319年與Richard De Kelso 5th Lord Of Kelsoland結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1353年7月20日在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess Matilda Maud Bruce于1303年7月12日出生在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林时，她的父亲Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots29岁，母亲Elizabeth de Burgh, Queen of Scots29岁。她于1319年与Richard De Kelso 5th Lord Of Kelsoland结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1353年7月20日在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾享年50岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: Bruce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from a place in Normandy, probably from Brix (La Manche).

History: The son of the Domesday baron, a friend of David I of Scotland, was granted by him the Lordship of Annandale in 1124, and his second son Robert became the founder of the Scottish house of Bruce. — This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with its original form Brousse in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Brousse
meanings: French: topographic name for someone living in a scrubby area, from Old French bro(u)ce ‘thicket, brushwood’ (from Late Latin bruscia), or a habitational name from any of several places in France named Brousse. Compare Bruce and Brusse .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered form Bruce) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Brewis
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Briouze in Orne.
(Northumberland and Durham): topographic name or nickname from Middle English breuhous ‘brewery’ (literally ‘brew house’).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Matilda Maud Bruce was born on 12 July 1303, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth de Burgh, Queen of Scots, was 29. She married Richard De Kelso 5th Lord Of Kelsoland in 1319. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 20 July 1353, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess Matilda Maud Bruce est née le 12 juillet 1303, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Burgh, Queen of Scots, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Richard De Kelso 5th Lord Of Kelsoland en 1319. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 20 juillet 1353, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess Matilda Maud Bruce am 12. Juli 1303 in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Burgh, Queen of Scots 29. Sie hat 1319 Richard De Kelso 5th Lord Of Kelsoland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 20. Juli 1353 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Matilda Maud Bruce è nata il il 12 luglio 1303 nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Burgh, Queen of Scots, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Richard De Kelso 5th Lord Of Kelsoland nel 1319. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 20 luglio 1353, nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Princess Matilda Maud Bruceが1303年7月12日にイギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで生まれた時，父Robert I the Bruce, King of Scotsは29歳，母Elizabeth de Burgh, Queen of Scotsは29歳であった。1319年にRichard De Kelso 5th Lord Of Kelsolandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1353年7月20日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで50歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Matilda Maud Bruce(이)가 1303년 7월 12일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Burgh, Queen of Scots(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1319년 Richard De Kelso 5th Lord Of Kelsoland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1353년 7월 20일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

pt.12 July 1303–20 July 1353: 12 de julho de 1303–20 de julho de 1353
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Matilda Maud Bruce nasceu em 12 de julho de 1303, em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Burgh, Queen of Scots, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard De Kelso 5th Lord Of Kelsoland em 1319. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 20 de julho de 1353, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Matilda Maud Bruce родилась 12 июля 1303 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Burgh, Queen of Scots, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard De Kelso 5th Lord Of Kelsoland в 1319 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 20 июля 1353 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.
